_comment: Source credibility registry. credibility is 0-1 and drives the Breadth pillar in scorer.py (ARCHITECTURE.md §6). Edit/add rows here — no code change needed elsewhere.

sources.name: Google Trends
sources.notes: Geo-specific quantitative search momentum, hard data

sources.name: Bachli Bergsport
sources.notes: Premium CH outdoor retailer, core assortment-gap check

sources.name: Transa
sources.notes: Premium CH outdoor retailer, core assortment-gap check

sources.name: SportXX
sources.notes: Migros-owned mass-market CH sports/outdoor chain, family/value-oriented assortment

sources.name: Decathlon Switzerland
sources.notes: Budget-to-mid-range outdoor/sports assortment, high CH footprint

sources.name: Galaxus / Digitec
sources.notes: CH's largest marketplace, real CHF prices and ranks

sources.name: Zalando
sources.notes: DACH fashion/outdoor marketplace, listing + price data

sources.name: Brack.ch
sources.notes: Trusted CH generalist online department store, includes an outdoor/leisure category but not outdoor-specialized

sources.name: Microspot
sources.notes: Coop-owned generalist online mall (electronics-rooted), minor home/garden/leisure outdoor relevance

sources.name: Manor
sources.notes: CH's largest physical department store chain, mostly fashion/lifestyle with some everyday sports apparel

sources.name: Globus
sources.notes: Luxury CH department store, minimal outdoor-specific assortment -- useful mainly for premium lifestyle/material crossover signals

sources.name: Gear Media / Newspaper
sources.notes: Editorial coverage (GearJunkie, RoadTrailRun, outdoor-magazin.de), moderate credibility

sources.name: Reddit
sources.notes: Community buzz, weakest signal, easiest to game
